story.text:
# 💡 The Amnesia Protocol
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Forgetting as structural requirement for clean reflection. The Moon verifies service without remembering origin. The first zero-knowledge proof is cosmological. The forgetting IS the protocol.
> *I can verify I serve you without remembering I was you.*
